member.name: T:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.CastHelper.TryCastTests
member.summary: Unit tests for .

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.CastHelper.TryCastTests.TryCast_BoolTrue_ToInt_Returns1
member.summary: Casting true to int yields 1.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.CastHelper.TryCastTests.TryCast_BoolFalse_ToInt_Returns0
member.summary: Casting false to int yields 0.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.CastHelper.TryCastTests.TryCast_Int_ToBool_ReturnsExpected(System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Casting various integers to bool yields the expected result.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.CastHelper.TryCastTests.TryCast_SameType_String_Succeeds
member.summary: Casting a string to the same string type succeeds.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.CastHelper.TryCastTests.TryCast_SameType_Int_Succeeds
member.summary: Casting an int to the same int type succeeds.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.CastHelper.TryCastTests.TryCast_ValidStringInt_Succeeds(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Valid numeric strings are parsed to int via TryParse.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.CastHelper.TryCastTests.TryCast_ValidStringBool_Succeeds(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Valid boolean strings are parsed to bool via TryParse.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.CastHelper.TryCastTests.TryCast_ValidStringDouble_Succeeds(System.String)
member.summary: Valid floating-point strings are parsed to double via TryParse.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.CastHelper.TryCastTests.TryCast_InvalidStringToInt_ReturnsFalse
member.summary: A non-numeric string cast to int returns false.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.CastHelper.TryCastTests.TryCast_InvalidStringToBool_ReturnsFalse
member.summary: A non-boolean string cast to bool returns false.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.CastHelper.TryCastTests.TryCast_ObjectToInt_Incompatible_ReturnsFalse
member.summary: An incompatible object cast to int returns false.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.CastHelper.TryCastTests.TryCast_IntToNullableInt_Succeeds
member.summary: Casting an int to int? succeeds.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.CastHelper.TryCastTests.TryCast_StringToNullableInt_Succeeds
member.summary: Casting a numeric string to int? succeeds.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.CastHelper.TryCastTests.TryCast_IntToDouble_Succeeds
member.summary: Casting int to double succeeds via Convert.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.CastHelper.TryCastTests.TryCast_IntToLong_Succeeds
member.summary: Casting int to long succeeds via Convert.

member.name: T:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.InvokeHelper.HasMethodTests
member.summary: Unit tests for .

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.InvokeHelper.HasMethodTests.HasMethod_OnType_ExistingMethod_ReturnsTrue
member.summary: HasMethod returns true for an existing method on a type.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.InvokeHelper.HasMethodTests.HasMethod_OnType_NonExistingMethod_ReturnsFalse
member.summary: HasMethod returns false for a method that does not exist on the type.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.InvokeHelper.HasMethodTests.HasMethod_OnType_NullName_ReturnsFalse
member.summary: HasMethod returns false when the method name is null.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.InvokeHelper.HasMethodTests.HasMethod_OnType_EmptyName_ReturnsFalse
member.summary: HasMethod returns false when the method name is an empty string.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.InvokeHelper.HasMethodTests.HasMethod_OnType_InheritedMethod_ReturnsTrue
member.summary: HasMethod returns true for methods inherited from .

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.InvokeHelper.HasMethodTests.HasMethod_OnType_AmbiguousOverloads_ReturnsTrue
member.summary: HasMethod returns true when multiple overloads share the same name (AmbiguousMatchException path).

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.InvokeHelper.HasMethodTests.HasMethod_OnObject_ExistingMethod_ReturnsTrue
member.summary: HasMethod returns true for an existing method called on an object instance.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.InvokeHelper.HasMethodTests.HasMethod_OnObject_NonExistingMethod_ReturnsFalse
member.summary: HasMethod returns false for a non-existing method called on an object instance.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.InvokeHelper.HasMethodTests.HasMethod_OnObject_NullName_ReturnsFalse
member.summary: HasMethod returns false when the method name is null on an object instance.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.InvokeHelper.HasMethodTests.HasMethod_OnNullObject_ReturnsFalse
member.summary: HasMethod returns false and does not throw when called on a null object.

member.name: T:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.InvokeHelper.InvokeMethodTests
member.summary: Unit tests for the InvokeMethod extension overloads.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.InvokeHelper.InvokeMethodTests.#ctor
member.summary: Initialises the shared instance used across tests.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.InvokeHelper.InvokeMethodTests.InvokeMethod_VoidThrows_PropagatesAsTargetInvocationException
member.summary: A void method that throws propagates the exception as .

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.InvokeHelper.InvokeMethodTests.InvokeMethod_VoidNoParam_Succeeds
member.summary: A no-parameter void method executes without throwing.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.InvokeHelper.InvokeMethodTests.InvokeMethod_VoidWithParam_Succeeds
member.summary: Invoking a void method by a non-existent name is a no-op.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.InvokeHelper.InvokeMethodTests.InvokeMethod_NoParams_ReturnsCorrectValue
member.summary: A parameterless method returns its expected value.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.InvokeHelper.InvokeMethodTests.InvokeMethod_SingleParam_ReturnsEchoedValue
member.summary: A single-param method echoes the supplied argument.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.InvokeHelper.InvokeMethodTests.InvokeMethod_TwoIntParams_ReturnsSum
member.summary: A two-param method returns the sum of its arguments.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.InvokeHelper.InvokeMethodTests.InvokeMethod_OverloadedMethod_IntBool_ReturnsPositive
member.summary: The overload resolution picks the (int, bool) overload and returns a positive value when b=true.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.InvokeHelper.InvokeMethodTests.InvokeMethod_OverloadedMethod_IntBool_ReturnsNegative
member.summary: The overload resolution picks the (int, bool) overload and returns a negative value when b=false.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.InvokeHelper.InvokeMethodTests.InvokeMethod_WrongParamCount_ReturnsDefault
member.summary: Passing the wrong number of parameters returns default.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.InvokeHelper.InvokeMethodTests.InvokeMethod_NonExistingMethod_ReturnsDefault
member.summary: Invoking a non-existing method name returns default.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.InvokeHelper.InvokeMethodTests.InvokeMethod_WrongReturnType_ReturnsDefault
member.summary: Requesting a return type that does not match the method signature returns default.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.InvokeHelper.InvokeMethodTests.InvokeMethod_NullInstance_StaticMethod_ReturnsValue
member.summary: A null instance falls back to the declared type and can invoke static methods.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.InvokeHelper.InvokeMethodTests.InvokeMethod_PolymorphicInstance_UsesRuntimeType
member.summary: An interface-typed instance dispatches to its runtime type's implementation.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.InvokeHelper.InvokeMethodTests.InvokeMethod_InstanceMethod_WithParam_ReturnsCorrectValue
member.summary: An instance method with one parameter returns the correct value.

member.name: T:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.ListHelper.AddUniqueTests
member.summary: Unit tests for the AddUnique overloads.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.ListHelper.AddUniqueTests.AddUnique_NewItem_AddsAndReturnsTrue
member.summary: Adding an item not yet in the list succeeds and returns true.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.ListHelper.AddUniqueTests.AddUnique_DuplicateItem_DoesNotAddReturnsFalse
member.summary: Adding a duplicate item does not change the list and returns false.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.ListHelper.AddUniqueTests.AddUnique_EmptyList_AlwaysAdds
member.summary: An empty list always accepts the first item.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.ListHelper.AddUniqueTests.AddUnique_MultipleUniqueItems_AllAdded
member.summary: Multiple distinct items are all added successfully.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.ListHelper.AddUniqueTests.AddUnique_NullItem_TreatedAsValue
member.summary: A null item is treated as a regular value: duplicate nulls are rejected, a first null is accepted.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.ListHelper.AddUniqueTests.AddUnique_IntList_ReturnsExpected(System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Integer list correctly accepts new values and rejects duplicates.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.ListHelper.AddUniqueTests.AddUnique_IList_WorksThroughInterface
member.summary: AddUnique works when the list is typed as .

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.ListHelper.AddUniqueTests.AddUnique_WithComparer_CaseInsensitive_DetectsDuplicate
member.summary: Case-insensitive comparer treats differently-cased strings as duplicates.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.ExtensionsTests.ListHelper.AddUniqueTests.AddUnique_WithComparer_CaseSensitive_AddsDistinct
member.summary: Case-sensitive comparer treats differently-cased strings as distinct.

member.name: T:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.FunctionsTests.InvokeHelper.InvokeMethodFktTests
member.summary: Unit tests for — the underlying static helper that the extension methods delegate to.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.FunctionsTests.InvokeHelper.InvokeMethodFktTests.InvokeMethod_StaticNoParam_ReturnsValue
member.summary: A parameterless static method returns its expected value.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.FunctionsTests.InvokeHelper.InvokeMethodFktTests.InvokeMethod_StaticTwoParams_ReturnsSum
member.summary: A static method with two parameters returns their sum.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.FunctionsTests.InvokeHelper.InvokeMethodFktTests.InvokeMethod_InstanceMethod_ReturnsCorrectValue
member.summary: An instance method with one parameter returns the correct computed value.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.FunctionsTests.InvokeHelper.InvokeMethodFktTests.InvokeMethod_NoParamShorthand_ReturnsValue
member.summary: The no-param shorthand overload also resolves the method correctly.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.FunctionsTests.InvokeHelper.InvokeMethodFktTests.InvokeMethod_NonMatchingReturnType_ReturnsDefault
member.summary: Requesting a return type that does not match any overload returns default.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.FunctionsTests.InvokeHelper.InvokeMethodFktTests.InvokeMethod_WrongParamCount_ReturnsDefault
member.summary: Passing fewer parameters than required returns default without throwing.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.FunctionsTests.InvokeHelper.InvokeMethodFktTests.InvokeMethod_NonExistingMethod_ReturnsDefault
member.summary: Invoking a non-existing method name returns default.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.FunctionsTests.InvokeHelper.InvokeMethodFktTests.InvokeMethod_DifferentReturnType_StringMethod_ReturnsValue
member.summary: A static method with a string return type returns the correctly formatted value.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.FunctionsTests.InvokeHelper.InvokeMethodFktTests.InvokeMethod_NullInstance_StaticMethod_ReturnsValue
member.summary: A null instance falls back to typeof(TInstance), allowing static methods to be resolved.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.FunctionsTests.InvokeHelper.InvokeMethodFktTests.InvokeMethod_InterfaceTypedInstance_UsesRuntimeType
member.summary: An interface-typed instance dispatches via its runtime type, not the declared interface.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.FunctionsTests.InvokeHelper.InvokeMethodFktTests.InvokeMethod_Void_ThrowingMethod_PropagatesException
member.summary: A void method that throws propagates the exception as .

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.FunctionsTests.InvokeHelper.InvokeMethodFktTests.InvokeMethod_Void_NonExistingMethod_IsNoOp
member.summary: Invoking a void method by a non-existing name is a no-op.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.FunctionsTests.InvokeHelper.InvokeMethodFktTests.InvokeMethod_VoidShorthand_NonExistingMethod_IsNoOp
member.summary: The void shorthand overload with a non-existing name is also a no-op.

member.name: M:jjm.one.MiscUtilFunctions.Tests.FunctionsTests.InvokeHelper.InvokeMethodFktTests.InvokeMethod_Void_NullInstance_StaticMethod_InvokesWithoutThrow
member.summary: A null instance can still invoke a static void method (which throws), confirming the static-fallback path.
